originalPrompt: Minimalist clean infographic illustrating Test Slug Schema sourcing challenge for NurturePure in France. Show a package outline, shipping container route from factory, and local compliance certification icons. Nature green and black color palette.
Diagram illustrating material barrier layers. Clean annotations in English: 'Oxygen Barrier', 'Moisture Guard', 'NurturePure Logo'.
Layer structure infographic showing a 3D cutaway of the multi-layer pouch structure with annotations of each layer and polymer type.
Machinery run diagram showing VFFS roll stock feeding into a form-fill-seal line with annotations of seal jaw temperatures and line speeds.
Certificate compliance map showing the validation steps from raw material supplier testing to final BPI or TÜV certificate issuance.
A step-by-step roadmap timeline illustrating the transition phases from design blueprints to retail shelf launch.
A professional product showcase layout displaying a biodegradable sample kit, a roll of custom eco film, and a cellophane wrapped product.
Clean studio product photography of a custom compostable Sachet for TerraSnacks showing natural texture and design, off-white background.
Infographic illustrating the multi-layer film barrier structure of Bio Cellulose Triplex Metalised showing layers: Cellulose, PLA, PBAT.
Diagram displaying the certification flow from raw material to TÜV Austria OK Compost and BPI ASTM D6400 approvals.
